additional_info_lines:
This data sheet was created in accordance with EU regulation (EC) No. 1907/2006 (REACH).
The information is based on the level of knowledge and experience on the date of issue, it do not have the importance
of assured properties. The information may not be changed or transferred to other products. Reproduction in the
unchanged state is permitted.
* Data changed compared with the previous version.
